name: Marcus Reid
comment: TrexLead completely transformed our lead pipeline. Within 3 months of running their Google Ads campaigns, we saw a 180% increase in qualified leads and our cost-per-acquisition dropped by 40%. Their team is sharp, data-driven, and genuinely invested in our growth.

name: Priya Sharma
comment: We hired TrexLead for Facebook Ads and SEO, and the results were beyond what we expected. Our property listings now rank on page one for key search terms, and our ad campaigns consistently deliver high-intent buyers. Best marketing investment we've made.

name: Daniel Osei
comment: TrexLead helped us scale from 200 to over 2,000 monthly orders in under six months. Their social media strategy and retargeting campaigns are incredibly effective. They don't just drive traffic — they drive buyers.

name: Sofia Mendes
comment: The TrexLead team built us a full-funnel strategy from awareness to conversion. Our email sequences alone now generate 30% of our monthly revenue. They understand the numbers and they know how to move them.

name: James Okafor
comment: I was skeptical about digital marketing but TrexLead proved me wrong fast. Within 6 weeks of launching our local SEO and paid ads, we had a waitlist for memberships. The ROI speaks for itself.

name: Amara Diallo
comment: As a startup, every naira counts. TrexLead built us a lean, high-performing ad strategy that helped us acquire our first 500 customers without burning through our budget. They're a true growth partner.
